name: Blueberry Cupcakes/ Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar on slow speed until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing until fully incorporated.
3. Sift together flour, salt, sugar, milk, baking powder.
4. Alternate adding dry ingredients with milk to the butter mixture.
5. Mash half of the blueberries by hand and stir in.
6. Fold in the remaining blueberries.
7. Fill muffin cups nearly full and sprinkle with additional sugar.
8. Bake at 375°F for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
9. Carefully remove from pan.
